about.title: ℹ️ About PasteKitLab
about.description: PasteKitLab is a powerful Chrome extension that provides multiple practical tools:
features_list: 🌐 IP address lookup and CIDR calculation
security_features: All encryption operations are completed in the local browser
Key information is stored locally only, never uploaded to servers
Compliant with modern Web security standards
tips: Please configure your encryption keys on the "Key Configuration" page, then verify functionality on the "Encryption/Decryption Test" page.
It is recommended to regularly backup your key information to avoid losing important data.
